name: Scheduled Task Creation from XML in Public Folder
description: Detects the creation of scheduled tasks using an XML file in C:\Users\Public Folder, a tactic identified in an APT campaign for maintaining persistence or executing malicious commands

filterSets.name: Scheduled Task Creation from XML in Public Folder via Schtasks
Scheduled Task Creation from XML in Public Folder via Powershell

author: Ahmed Kamal & Bahaa Yamany
